ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* Composition of the material */,
  "material_properties" TEXT /* Physical properties of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of classification model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the classification model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to train the classification model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the classification model for the material */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the classification model for the material */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the classification model for the material */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support of the classification model for the material */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were evaluated */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used to evaluate the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "feature1" REAL /* Feature 1 of the data point */,
  "feature2" REAL /* Feature 2 of the data point */,
  "feature3" REAL /* Feature 3 of the data point */,
  "data_point_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was collected */,
  "data_point_source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_upgrades" (
  "upgrade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upgrade */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model */,
  "upgrade_date" TEXT /* Date the upgrade was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the upgrade */,
  "upgrade_type" TEXT /* Type of upgrade */,
  "upgrade_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the upgrade on the classification model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upgrade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_upgrades_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was made */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Category of the log entry */,
  "log_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each classification model
Parameters used to train the classification model
